title: Compute Access Right
description: A governed, scoped, traceable, and reviewable right to use AI compute capacity, such as rate-limit resets, priority usage windows, temporary access boosts, or contribution-based compute access returns.

id.description: Unique identifier for the compute access right.

granted_to.description: Recipient of the compute access right.

granted_by.description: System, organization, governance body, or agent that granted the right.

trigger.description: Event or condition that caused the access right to be granted.

reference.description: Reference to the origin event, contribution, policy decision, or external record.

scope.description: Defines where and how the compute access right may be used.

service.description: AI service, agent, model platform, or compute pool where this right applies.

model_tier.description: Optional model tier or capability class.

max_uses.description: Maximum number of times this access right may be used.

transferable.description: Whether the right may be transferred to another user.

cash_value.description: Whether the right has declared cash value.

resale_allowed.description: Whether resale or secondary-market exchange is allowed.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state and validity period of the compute access right.

expires_at.description: Expiration time. v0.1 requires expiration to prevent hoarding.

policy.description: Policy controls for use, approval, revocation, and audit.

maximum_balance.description: Maximum number of similar rights that may be held by the recipient.

trace.description: Trace record explaining why the access right exists and how it should be audited.

origin_event.description: Origin event that generated this compute access right.

contribution_ref.description: Optional reference to a contribution, review, safety report, code patch, or documentation record.

policy_ref.description: Optional reference to the governing policy.

review.description: Optional review state for high-impact, disputed, or contribution-based grants.

return_flow.description: Optional return-flow metadata when the compute access right is granted as a royalty-style return for contribution.

source_contribution.description: Contribution or origin source that generated the return.

allocation_basis.description: Basis for deciding the access return.
